---
title: "Abhishek Baraili"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/abhishekbaraili
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/REPLACE-ME
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:abhishek_becon2022@kusoa.edu.np"
---

I am a final-year economics undergraduate. I work on applied statistics and
causal inference, mostly with Nepali data.

This site is where I write up short projects: one question, a research design,
and whatever it takes in R, Python, or Stata to answer it. Some work, some don't.

## Photos

<div style="max-width: 640px; margin: 1.5rem auto;">
<div id="photoCarousel" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="carousel">
  <div class="carousel-indicators">
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#photoCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active" aria-label="Photo 1"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#photoCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="1" aria-label="Photo 2"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#photoCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="2" aria-label="Photo 3"></button>
  </div>
  <div class="carousel-inner" style="border-radius: 8px;">
    <div class="carousel-item active">
      <img src="photos/cafe.jpg" class="d-block w-100" style="height: 420px; object-fit: cover;" alt="Cafe">
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-item">
      <img src="photos/guitar.jpg" class="d-block w-100" style="height: 420px; object-fit: cover;" alt="Guitar">
    </div>
    <div class="carousel-item">
      <img src="photos/scene.jpg" class="d-block w-100" style="height: 420px; object-fit: cover;" alt="Scene">
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#photoCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
    <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
  </button>
  <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#photoCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
    <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
  </button>
</div>
</div>
